zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Chidiocke於大約1435年出生在英國多瑟特時，她的父親Sir John Chideock35歲，母親Katherine Lumley41歲。她於1450年5月18日之前與William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年3月12日在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Chidiocke于大约1435年出生在英国多瑟特时，她的父亲Sir John Chideock35岁，母亲Katherine Lumley41岁。她于1450年5月18日之前与William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1503年3月12日在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Chidiocke was born about 1435, in Dorset, England, her father, Sir John Chideock, was 35 and her mother, Katherine Lumley, was 41. She married William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton before 18 May 1450, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 12 March 1503, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Chidiocke est née environ 1435, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Chideock, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Katherine Lumley, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton avant 18 mai 1450, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1503, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Chidiocke um 1435 in Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Chideock 35 und ihre Mutter Katherine Lumley 41. Sie hat vor 18. Mai 1450 in England William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. März 1503 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chidiocke è nata il circa 1435 nel Dorset, England, sua padre, Sir John Chideock, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Katherine Lumley, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton prima del 18 maggio 1450, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 12 marzo 1503, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Chidiockeが約1435年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父Sir John Chideockは35歳，母Katherine Lumleyは41歳であった。1450年5月18日以前にイギリスでWilliam Stourton 2nd Baron Stourtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1503年3月12日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Chidiocke(이)가 대략 1435년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Chideock(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Lumley(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1450년 5월 18일 이전 영국에서 William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chidiocke nasceu aproximadamente 1435, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Chideock, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Lumley, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton antes 18 de maio de 1450, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de março de 1503, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Chidiocke родилась около 1435 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Chideock было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Lumley, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton перед 18 май 1450 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 12 марта 1503 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton antes de 18 de mayo de 1450, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1503, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
